---
name: Fix
about: Bug fix (fix:)
---

## Summary

<!-- What was broken and how does this fix it? -->

## Reproduction (if applicable)

<!-- Steps or notes that help reviewers verify the fix -->

## Commits

Use **`fix:`** or **`fix(scope):`**, e.g. `fix: correct contrast on focus ring`.

## Checklist

- [ ] Fix verified manually or via tests
- [ ] Regenerated preview assets updated if the bug affected user-visible output (see `AGENTS.md`)
